rulings.Case Title: BRIDGEWAY VISTA, LP VS. MOON ENG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 29, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF BRIDGEWAY VISTA, LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required to address what competent evidence is presented re possession. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. GABRIEL MUNOZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 29, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JOSE MARTINEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burden. No competent evidence re tenancy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOUGH CLUB LLC VS. ATTORNEY DIVERSIFIED SERVICES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 29, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT WILLIAMS COLE, INC.'s Claim Of Right To Possession.\ Hearing required. = (501/REQ)
